category_sources: source_facts.description identifies xa as a 6502 cross assembler; source_facts.homepage is the official Floodgap xa page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xa; official homepage URL path is /retrotech/xa.
docs_sources: Official Floodgap xa homepage is the best official documentation surface found and is also source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Floodgap homepage and source_facts.source-archive provide release tarballs but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says 6502 cross assembler; source_facts.executables include xa and related utilities.
